page.title: Workspace
page.subtitle: Manage brand, legal info, language, and timezone

membersPage.title: Members
membersPage.subtitle: Manage teammates and the AI teammate (Cue)

dataExport.intro: Export your personal data or workspace data as a ZIP file. Files are kept as-is and documents are saved as HTML.
dataExport.myDesc: Download the personal (private) files you uploaded and the documents you created.
dataExport.wsDesc: Download shared workspace data (team, workspace, and external). Members' personal (private) data is not included.
dataExport.confidentialNote: {{n}} confidential item(s) included. Exported with admin permission and recorded in the audit log.
dataExport.errGeneric: Something went wrong during download. Please try again shortly.
dataExport.trDesc: Copy your personal (private) data to another workspace you belong to. The original stays intact.
dataExport.trConfirmMsg: Copy your personal data to the selected workspace. The original stays intact. Continue?
dataExport.trErr: Something went wrong during transfer. Please try again shortly.
dataExport.trDesc2: Move your personal (private) data to another workspace you belong to. Choose copy (keep original) or move (clean up original). Processed in the background.
dataExport.modeMoveDesc: Transfer then clean up the original
dataExport.includeQnote: Include Q Note sessions (summary & transcript as documents)
dataExport.trQueued: Processing in the background. You'll be notified and see it in the activity list below when done.
dataExport.jobsDesc: Tasks processed in the background. Export results are downloadable for 30 days.
dataExport.moveConfirmMsg: Move your personal data to the selected workspace and clean up the originals here (files deleted, documents archived). Continue?

autoFinalize.title: Weekly Report Auto-Finalize
autoFinalize.desc: Each week's workspace report will be auto-finalized at this day & time. Timezone: {{tz}}.
autoFinalize.enabledHint: When off, automatic finalize stops. The "Finalize this week" button still works manually.
autoFinalize.dowHint: Last week's data will be finalized on this day (default: Monday).
autoFinalize.hourHint: Based on workspace timezone (default: 00:00 — right after midnight).

workManagement.readOnly: Only workspace admins can change these settings.

system.title: Mail delivery
system.desc: PlanQ sends invoices, signature requests, and document shares through the system mail server
system.connected: System mail server is connected — emails go out normally
system.disconnected: System mail server is not connected — emails will not be sent until SMTP is configured

identity.title: Sender identity
identity.desc: The sender name and reply-to address shown on outgoing emails
identity.fromNameHint: Workspace brand name is used if blank
identity.replyToHint: Customer replies land here. If blank, replies are not possible.

future.title: Send via your own mail
future.desc: Send through your Gmail / company SMTP
future.preparingDesc: Connecting your own Gmail or SMTP for direct delivery is on the way.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc2: Pick where each event reaches you. Default is all ON.

eventDesc.message: New message arrives in a chat room

notifications.footerNote: Inbox is the in-app notification area. Chat / Email go to external channels.

policy.title: What this matrix controls
policy.appliesTo: Applies only to notifications sent to workspace members (task assignment / review, calendar invites, mentions, invoice & tax-invoice review, etc.).
policy.systemAlways: Security emails (signup verification, password reset, signature OTP) are always sent — they ignore this matrix.
policy.clientAlways: Emails to external clients (invoice, document share, signature request) also bypass this matrix — they are deliberate sends from the workspace.

permissions.title: Permission Policy
permissions.subtitle: Open by default — only actions that affect the whole team are selectively restricted. The default is 'Allow all members' and can be changed anytime.
permissions.owner_only_hint: Only owners can change these settings. All members can view this page.

financial.title: Billing Actions
financial.desc: Creating/sending quotes and invoices, editing contract amount and monthly fee

schedule.title: Schedule Changes
schedule.desc: Adjusting project start/end dates, editing due dates on tasks assigned to others

client_info.title: Client Billing Info
client_info.desc: Editing a client's business number, bank account, address used for invoicing (viewing is always open)

storage.title: Storage & Integrations
storage.desc: Configure workspace file storage and external integrations. Choose between PlanQ storage or Google Drive; connecting Google Calendar enables auto-generated Meet links.
storage.scopeTitle: File location — workspace shared vs personal vault
storage.scopeBackedUp: Workspace shared (project/task/chat attachments): goes to Drive when connected; otherwise PlanQ storage
storage.scopeLocal: Personal vault (My files, personal notes): always PlanQ storage — independent of Drive integration, no per-user quota (counted against workspace shared quota)
storage.scopeOneWay: Files you create or delete directly in Drive will NOT sync to PlanQ. Manage files inside PlanQ only.
storage.disconnectDesc: After disconnecting, new uploads go back to PlanQ's own storage.
storage.disconnectWarn: Existing files in the external cloud remain untouched.

planq.title: PlanQ Storage
planq.desc: Workspace shared + personal vault — both stored in PlanQ. Plan-based quota.
planq.descConnected: Personal vault always uses PlanQ storage. New workspace shared uploads go to Drive — existing files preserved.
planq.inactiveDesc: New uploads go to Google Drive. Existing files remain here

gdrive.title: Google Drive
gdrive.desc: App-scoped folder (drive.file) — PlanQ only accesses files it creates

brand.sectionDesc: The name, logo, and color your workspace shows in UI and conversations.
brand.name: Workspace Name
brand.nameEnHint: Used in documents sent to international clients
brand.colorHint: Used for conversation headers and buttons

legal.sectionDesc: Information used on official documents like invoices and contracts. Not shown to customers.

language.sectionDesc: Default language and work hours for the workspace. Affects when Cue auto-responds.
language.defaultLanguageHint: Can be changed later. If set to English, English label fields are hidden.
language.workHoursHint: Cue responds more aggressively outside work hours

timezone.calloutBody: All work time — deadlines, this-week tasks, progress aggregates — is calculated in this workspace timezone. Even if teammates are in different regions, the boundary of a day is based on this setting.
timezone.primaryDesc: All schedules, deadlines, and message times are stored in UTC and displayed in each viewer's timezone. This is the workspace-wide reference.
timezone.referenceDesc: Additional timezones shown in the sidebar clock. Add zones your team frequently references.

members.sectionDesc: Manage people and Cue (AI teammate) in this workspace.
members.cueCardDesc: Cue answers customer questions based on your knowledge and works alongside your human team.
members.inviteErrAlreadyMember: This user is already a member.
members.inviteErrAlreadyInvited: This email has already been invited.
members.inviteErrForbidden: You don't have permission to invite.
members.pendingNote: Profile shows up after the invite is accepted.

drawer.profileHint: Only this person can edit these fields from their own profile page.
drawer.workHoursHint: Either the member or a workspace admin can adjust. Used for task assignment and weekly forecasts.
drawer.workHoursReadOnly: Only the member or a workspace admin can edit.
drawer.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the workspace. Their past task history is preserved.
drawer.leaveConfirm: Leave this workspace? Your past task history will be preserved.
drawer.cancelInviteConfirm: Cancel this invite? The invitation link will be revoked.
drawer.errLastOwner: Cannot remove or demote the last admin. Promote another member to admin first.
drawer.errForbidden: You don't have permission to remove.

cue.sectionDesc: Cue is your workspace's AI teammate. Configure how it responds and monitor usage.
cue.modeSmart: Only answer what it knows well
cue.modeSmartHint: Auto-send only when confident; show to humans first when unsure
cue.modeAutoHint: Always auto-send. May occasionally be wrong
cue.modeDraftHint: Cue drafts responses; humans approve before sending
cue.pauseHint: When on, Cue doesn't respond in any conversation. You can also pause per-conversation.
cue.usageExceeded: You've used your monthly allowance. Cue will be back next month.

pushPrompt.title: Device notifications are off
pushPrompt.desc: Turn them on to get new messages and task alerts even when you're not looking at PlanQ.
pushPrompt.deniedDesc: Open your browser's site permissions and allow notifications to receive them.
pushPrompt.iosTitle: iPhone notifications require installing the PlanQ app
pushPrompt.iosDesc: Tap Safari's share button → "Add to Home Screen" → notifications work in the installed PlanQ app

pwa.sectionDesc: Add to your home screen for faster access and notifications.
pwa.installedNote: You're currently running the PlanQ app. To install on another device, open PlanQ in its browser.
pwa.iosStep1: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari
pwa.iosNote: iOS doesn't allow browsers to trigger an install dialog automatically — you need to use the menu manually.
pwa.promptNote: Tap the button below to open the browser's install dialog. Accept it and the PlanQ icon will be added to your home screen (or app drawer / start menu).
pwa.installedMsg: Installed. Open PlanQ from your home screen.
pwa.unavailableMsg: Install prompt isn't available right now.
pwa.relatedInstalledNote: PlanQ is already installed on this device. You're viewing it in a browser tab right now.
pwa.openInAppHint: Tap "Open in app" on the right of the address bar, or open PlanQ from your home screen / app drawer / Start menu.
pwa.troubleAlready: PlanQ may already be installed — check your home screen, app drawer, or Start menu.
pwa.troubleCooldown: Browsers may hide the install option for a few days after you've dismissed it once.
pwa.troubleIncognito: PWA installation doesn't work in private / guest browsing mode.

androidChrome.1: Open the ⋮ (three vertical dots) menu next to the address bar
androidChrome.2: Choose "Add to Home screen" or "Install app"

androidSamsung.1: Open the ☰ menu at the bottom

desktopChromium.1: Click the install icon (⊕ or monitor with ↓) on the right of the address bar, or
desktopChromium.2: Open the ⋮ menu next to the address bar → "Install PlanQ" / "Install app"
desktopChromium.3: Confirm in the install dialog — PlanQ is added to your Start menu / Dock

firefox.1: Firefox has limited PWA install support
firefox.2: Recommended: reopen in Chrome / Edge / Samsung Internet

desktopSafari.1: Desktop Safari doesn't support PWA installation
desktopSafari.2: You can only bookmark or add to Dock for quick access

other.1: This browser doesn't support PWA installation, or it can't be identified
other.2: Try again in Chrome / Edge / Samsung Internet, or iOS Safari

matrix.title: Member menu permissions
matrix.desc: Adjust read/write per menu per member. Default is full write — restrict only if needed. Owners and admins always have full access.
matrix.ownerOnlyHint: Only owners and admins can change permissions.
matrix.warnNoQbillWrite: ⚠ No member has Q Bill write access — invoices cannot be issued. At least 1 recommended.

confirm.promoteAdmin: Promote {{name}} to admin? Admins have almost all permissions except HR, billing settings, and tax invoices.

billing.title: Default billing owner
billing.desc: New invoices are auto-assigned to this owner. Choose from owners, admins, or members with Q Bill write access.
billing.label: Default billing owner
billing.hint: Select from {{count}} candidate(s). Auto-filled on new invoice creation.
